p1.title: PRATA CULT

p3.description: Meliponiculture workshops (native stingless bees) with schools and community.

p4.description: Community garden, school activities, native trees and fruit preservation.

p4c.description: Full documentary coverage of EG South America work. COP30, Virada Climática, Vulcan Festival and all EG events.

p6.description: Continuous advocacy and research on water bodies, flora and fauna.

p7.title: KIT AMIGXS DA ÁGUA
p7.description: Analysis and control of pH and water quality with homemade and accessible kits.

p8.title: SACRIFICE ZONES MAPPING
p8.description: Initial mapping of vulnerable communities across South and Central America.

p9.title: RADIOLOGICAL & FOOD SAFETY
p9.description: Strategic focus areas of the observatory - radiological and food safety.

p10.title: ECOTRACK MAPBIOMAS
p10.description: Geohydrographic tools for community spring cataloging and watershed monitoring.

p14.title: XÔ MINERADORAS
p14.description: Community uprising against bauxite mining that threatened water sources. Base for Vulcan Observatory.

p14b.description: Music video exposing climate crises and rising youth voices. Winner of Concurso Curta Prata 2016.

p15.description: International visibility and advocacy network strengthening via Mídia Ninja.

p16b.description: Elderly facilitator and community bridge. Wisdom Adviser for EG Cascata project.

p17.title: BAQUE MULHER
p17.description: Female-only empowerment movement through maracatu. Performances at cultural events.

p18.description: Agroforestry System (SAF) as living lab for restoration and environmental education projects.
